faq.question: How to calculate salary tax in Estonia?
faq.answer: Salary tax in Estonia consists of: 1) Income tax (22%), 2) Social tax (33% - paid by employer), 3) Unemployment insurance (1.6% employee + 0.8% employer). Use our salary calculator for exact figures.

faq.question: How to pay dividends from an Estonian company?
faq.answer: Dividends in Estonia are taxed at 22/78 of the net amount (effectively 28,2%). To pay dividends: 1) Have sufficient retained earnings, 2) Prepare board resolution, 3) File dividend declaration with tax board, 4) Pay tax by the 10th of following month.

faq.question: How to register for VAT in Estonia?
faq.answer: Register for VAT if: 1) Your turnover exceeds €40,000 per year, or 2) You voluntarily register. Registration is done through the e-Tax portal. You'll receive your VAT number within 3-5 business days.

faq.question: What are the accounting deadlines in Estonia?
faq.answer: Key deadlines: Monthly VAT returns - by 20th of following month. Monthly payroll reports - by 10th of following month. Annual report - within 6 months after financial year end. Annual tax declarations - by June 30th.
